title: Onboarding - Eula page - License Agreement and Privacy Policy links when the internet is turned off
scenario: Onboarding EULA page shows "Something went wrong" when tapping License Agreement or Privacy Policy links with no internet, and Cancel returns to onboarding screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the onboarding screen ("Well hello, first things first..."), ensure the device has no internet connection (e.g., Airplane Mode or Wi-Fi/Data turned off).
5. Tap the Cancel button on the error screen.
6. Observe the screen you return to.
9. Tap the Cancel button on the error screen.
10. Observe the screen you return to.
expected: Tapping either the License Agreement or Privacy Policy link should load the respective legal document content within the app, even without internet (if cached), or display a graceful offline message with a way to retry or dismiss. Tapping Cancel should return the user to the onboarding screen.
